rulings.Case Title: ROOSEVELT HOLLINS et al VS. A.W.CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Foster Wheeler, Llcs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JUNE 28, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT FOSTER WHEELER, L.L.C.'s Motion To Strike Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint IS DENIED; ALLEGATIONS IN PARAGRAPHS 7, 26 THROUGH 30 ARE SUFFICIENT UNDER ROMO V FORD MOTOR CO. (2002) 99 CAL. APP. 4TH 1115, 1140. IT IS NOT NECESSARY TO IDENTIFY THE MANAGING AGENT. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: ROOSEVELT HOLLINS et al VS. A.W.CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JUNE 28, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT FOSTER WHEELER, L.L.C.'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED; EXACTLY WHERE THE WORK OCCURRED IS NOT SUFFICIENTLY CLEAR TO INVOKE THE "FEDERAL ENCLAVE" DOCTRINE. SUFFICIENT FACTS ARE ALLEGED TO SUPPORT PLAINTIFF'S CAUSES OF ACTION. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: ENVIRONMENTAL WORLD WATCH,INC.,IN THE PUBLIC VS. AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Pl'S Related Motions For Orders Substituting Anthony G. Graham As Counsel For Pl And Other Relief
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JUNE 28, 2007, LINE 4. DEFENDANT YEROUSHAMLMI & ASSOCIATES' Motion For Reconsideration Of PLAINTIFF'S Related Motions For Orders Substituting Anthony G. Graham As Counsel For PLAINTIFF And Other Relief: THE COURT AGREES WITH DEFENDANT'S POSITION THAT THE ONLY AUTHORITY TO AWARD SANCTIONS IS BASED ON C.C.P. SECTION 128.7. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO SUBMIT A SUPPLEMENTAL REQUEST FOR FEES WHICH IDENTIFIES ANY APPLICABLE PLEADINGS THAT WOULD WARRANT SANCTIONS BY JULY 13, 2007. DEFENDANT MAY SUBMIT AN OPPOSITION BY JULY 24, 2007 AND PLAINTIFF MAY REPLY BY JULY 30, 2007 AND THE HEARING WILL BE ON AUGUST 2, 2007. AT THAT TIME, THE COURT WILL CONSIDER MODIFYING PARAGRAPH FOUR OF THE APRIL 27, 2007 ORDER. =(302/PJM/JF)

PLAINTIFF ENVIRONMENTAL WORLD WATCH, INC.'S MOTION For Order That Former PLAINTIFF'S Counsel Yeroushalmi Pay As Sanctions PLAINTIFF'S Reasonable ATTORNEY Fees AND Costs For Bringing It'S MOTIONS For An Order IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 2, 2007. =(302/PJM/JF)

rulings.Case Title: VERNON FARQUHAR VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS B*P AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al

rulings.Case Title: NIKOLAUS VON BAILLOU VS. FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder In Demurrer To Deft Fidelity'S Demurrer To Complaint; Amended Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JUNE 28, 2007, LINE 10. DEFENDANT CATHY GARIBALDI'S Joinder In Demurrer To DEFENDANT Fidelity'S Demurrer To Complaint IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN TWENTY DAYS FOR UNCERTAINTY. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ALLEGED WHAT DEFENDANT DID. DEFENDANT HAS NOT IDENTIFIED THE APPLICABLE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS OR ADDRESSED PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGATION THAT THE CAUSES OF ACTION DID NOT ACCRUE UNTIL PLAINTIFF SUSTAINED AN INJURY. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: NIKOLAUS VON BAILLOU VS. FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JUNE 28, 2007, LINE 10. DEFENDANT CATHY GARIBALDI'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED BASED ON UNCERTAINTY FOR A FAILURE TO ALLEGE WHAT DEFENDANT DID. LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN TWENTY DAY. =(302/PJM/PB)
